question: How can we validate synthetic lethal gene pairs from Feng et al. (2022) and identify druggable opportunities for TP53-mutant cancers?
revision: v3 — publication pipeline with Synapse grounding

synapse_grounding.name: GSE34258 — TP53 mutation and chromothripsis in medulloblastoma
synapse_grounding.rationale: Profiles TP53 germline mutations (Li-Fraumeni) in medulloblastoma; demonstrates TP53 mutation drives genomic instability

synapse_grounding.name: GSE19416 — TP53 mutation in ovarian tumours
synapse_grounding.rationale: Genome-wide copy number data for TP53-mutant vs wildtype ovarian tumors

nodes.label: TOP Trial - Osimertinib +/- Carboplatin/Pemetrexed for EGFR+TP53 NSCLC
TRUMP Study - NGS-directed therapy for advanced NSCLC

properties.note: Top TP53-associated disease in Open Targets

synapse_grounding.name: GSE34258 — TP53 germline mutation / Li-Fraumeni / chromothripsis
synapse_grounding.rationale: Directly studies Li-Fraumeni syndrome patients with germline TP53 mutations in medulloblastoma

properties.note: Most relevant cancer type for NCT04695925 (NSCLC with TP53 mutations)

synapse_grounding.name: TCGA Lung adenocarcinoma - Consolidated
synapse_grounding.rationale: Comprehensive TCGA lung adenocarcinoma dataset with genomic, transcriptomic, methylation, and clinical data; directly profiles the disease type relevant to NCT04695925

synapse_grounding.name: Lung adenocarcinoma (TCGA multi-omic)
synapse_grounding.rationale: Multi-omic TCGA lung adenocarcinoma data including copy number, expression, methylation, RPPA, miRNA, and mutation data

synapse_grounding.name: Phenotype Transitions in Small Cell Lung Cancer
synapse_grounding.rationale: SCLC-focused (not adenocarcinoma) but studies drug resistance mechanisms in lung cancer

edges.evidence: BioGRID genetic interaction confirmed (TP53 has 388 genetic interactions, TYMS confirmed as partner)

synapse_grounding.name: Investigating Synthetic Lethality Associated with NF1 Loss
synapse_grounding.rationale: Same mechanism (synthetic lethality from tumor suppressor loss) tested for NF1 instead of TP53; uses CRISPR/Cas9 screens to identify druggable SL partners

edges.evidence: ChEMBL /mechanism endpoint: 'Thymidylate synthase inhibitor' (mec_id=9637, target_chembl=CHEMBL1952, direct_interaction=1, disease_efficacy=1, max_phase=4)
ChEMBL CHEMBL:185 (5-fluorouracil), approved TYMS inhibitor, max_phase=4
ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04695925: Phase III RCT of Osimertinib + Carboplatin/Pemetrexed for EGFR+TP53 NSCLC
ClinicalTrials.gov NCT03574402: Phase II umbrella study of NGS-directed therapy for advanced NSCLC (includes Pemetrexed arm)
Open Targets association score 0.876 (rank 1 of 3,277 associations for ENSG00000141510)
Open Targets association score 0.729 (rank 7 of 3,277 associations for ENSG00000141510)

metadata.source_reference: Feng et al., Sci. Adv. 8, eabm6638 (2022). PMC9098673.

synapse_grounding_summary.coverage: TP53 (2 datasets), Li-Fraumeni (1 dataset), lung adenocarcinoma (3 datasets), TP53-TYMS SL edge (1 analogous dataset). No direct Pemetrexed or TYMS datasets found.
